title: agalinis neoscotica
intro: Agalinis neoscotica, also known as New Scotland agalinis, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly due to its content of iridoids and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Agalinis neoscotica include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Agalinis neoscotica is often prepared as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
